title.en: Ye Tian entered this inheritance relic.

content.en:
"Ye Tian Realm Lord, this is the Fifth Realm Inheritance Land that this is the Fifth Realm Inheritance Master of the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance, it is a Fifth Realm that fell before the thirty-six multi-dimensional tribulations, and it is said that its strength is also extremely strong, but it offended several Fifth Realm peak existences, so it was severely damaged, and finally fell here. "

"A Fourth Realm discovered this heritage relic and contributed it. "

The fourth realm of the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance, the Shadow Cultivation Realm Master, took Ye Tian to a heritage relic and introduced.

According to the introduction of the Shadow Cultivation Realm Lord, this fifth realm is called the Demon Universe Realm Lord, and his strength is also quite good, but unfortunately he still falls.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered this inheritance relic.

After dozens of extradimensional eras, Ye Tian came out of this ruin, bringing out three quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasures, two innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritances, several secret techniques, and other resources.

He shared all those inheritances with the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance, and even some resources were divided.

In the days that followed, the relics of the Gate Inheritance were contributed by the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance.

After all, if you cultivate to the existence of the fourth realm, you can more or less find some inheritance relics, but many inheritance relics are too demanding, and he 310 can't get rewards for entering the fourth realm, so he can only share them.

And Ye Tian is not only powerful, but also talented and demonic, even if those inheritance relics have extremely difficult tests, they can't be difficult for him.

Gradually, Ye Tian gained a large number of benefits and many inheritances, and even the innate multi-dimensional Dao body obtained dozens of doors.

But his Sanwu secret method inheritance can only allow him to cultivate three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, no matter how many other innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies there are, he can't cultivate, but he can leave it to the human race, as the inheritance of the human race.

......

"A place of inheritance for the lord of the Wumu realm?"

Ye Tian received the notice from the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance, and was immediately shocked, and this time it was not an ordinary inheritance place, the grade was relatively high, but the test was very difficult.

This was discovered by a certain Fourth Realm over a long period of time, and no other Fourth Realm has been discovered so far.

This Fourth Realm was unable to pass the test, and therefore could not obtain any benefits, so this inheritance land was handed over to the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance.

Now.

The multi-dimensional fourth realm of the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance has all participated in the test in the past, and each of them must make an oath not to leak it, otherwise once they are known by those overlord-level extradimensional forces, it will not be their turn to be in charge of the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance.

Wow!

Ye Tian immediately rushed over and soon came to the place of inheritance.

This inheritance land is located in the sixth dimension, and the other fourth realms have to enter the sixth dimension through special methods or formations, but Ye Tian can easily escape into the sixth dimension.

This is the ability that can only be possessed after the completion of the third layer of the black mother's body.

Wow!

Ye Tian easily escaped into this inheritance place of the Wumu Realm Lord.

I saw that in front of him, there were nine huge whirlpools, each whirlpool was a passage, somewhat similar to the last time I saw the inheritance land of the lord of the Wumu Realm, except that there were many fewer passages.

The Extinction Realm Lord and the Shadow Cultivation Realm Lord are all here, and they are also contemplating these vortex passages.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, you're here too!"

The Lord of the Extinction Realm came over.

"Extinction Realm Lord, what's the situation now?" Ye Tian asked.

The Extinction Realm Lord introduced: "At present, some Fourth Realms have infiltrated these nine whirlpools, but all of them have been strangled without exception. "

"Tried all nine?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"We all tried, all of them fell, and we were directly trapped outside this inheritance land, but judging from this style, as well as the formations and traces here, we can judge that this is indeed the inheritance place of the Wumu Realm Lord. The Lord of the Extinction Realm affirmed.

Ye Tian stared at these nine whirlpools, and also silently comprehended here.

The mystery here is even more mysterious than the inheritance land I saw at the beginning, and it is worthy of being the inheritance place of the Wumu realm lord with a higher grade (cfbd).

Time passed slowly, and more and more of the Fourth Realm gave up and left here directly.

They don't want to waste their time here, and there are other Fourth Realms to study, and if they do, they'll get the news and come back then.

Before you know it, a hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

After contemplating enlightenment for so long, Ye Tian finally had research results.

"Strictly speaking, these nine vortices are all correct passages, but they are incorrect passages, and if you want to enter the Land of Inheritance, you must integrate this passage. "

How to integrate it?

Ye Tian had a clue, that is, to use the extradimensional rules to unite the nine vortices together, so as to stimulate the real channel, so that he could break through.

But the permutations and combinations are different, and the places to which they lead are different.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend, and once again spent a hundred extradimensional eras, and finally understood it.

Rumble!!!

A large number of extradimensional rules appeared on Ye Tian's body, integrated into these nine vortex channels.

In the next moment, the nine vortex passages lit up at the same time, and gradually the power merged, and the tenth passage gradually emerged, forming a portal.

Wow!

Ye Tian escaped directly into it.

When the other Fourth Realms saw this scene, they also wanted to follow along.

Outcome.

Rumble!!!

They were directly shocked by this portal, and they couldn't get in at all.

Obviously, there is a special power on this passage gate, and only the fourth realm that has completed this test is allowed to enter, and the other fourth realms cannot enter.

......

The land of the inheritance of the lord of the Wumu realm.

Ye Tian saw a statue, which seemed to be the statue of the Lord of the Wumu Realm.

To her surprise, this Wumu Realm Lord was a woman, and he had always thought it was a certain man!

After coming here, he also knew what the test was.

"Self-created Eighth Dimension Peerless Learning!"

Ye Tian had already created the Eighth Dimension Will, and this test was too easy for him.

However, the Eighth Dimensional Will Peerless Sect that he himself would know was definitely not in line with the requirements, and he had to create the Eighth Dimensional Will Peerless Sect by himself according to the requirements of this Black Mother Realm Lord.

Airplanes!!!!

A strange sacred tree emerges from the void.

This sacred tree is not simple, although it is only a projection, but it shows that it is very extraordinary.

And this time the test is to create a self-related eighth dimensional will mastery.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian comprehended the projection of this divine tree, and then continued to analyze and study.

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, another five hundred extradimensional epochs had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian successfully created a qualified eighth dimensional will peerless study.
